query: I was charged twice this month and I want a refund.
final_response: We're sorry, we could not generate a verified response at this time. Please contact our support team directly.

rejected_fragments.fragment: It appears you were charged twice this month. Please provide your transaction ID so we can investigate and process your refund, which typically takes 5-7 business days.

I understand you've been charged twice and are requesting a refund. Refund requests require review by our support team to assess eligibility based on your account details and applicable policies. I am escalating this to a human agent who will investigate your charges and assist you directly.
Duplicate charges can occur due to a system error. Please contact support with your transaction ID so we can investigate and refund the duplicate charge, which typically takes 5-7 business days.

I'm so sorry to hear you've been charged twice this month. That's definitely not right, and I understand how frustrating that must be. I can certainly help you look into this and ensure we get it resolved for you.
